notes: Barcode box: type a barcode and press Enter to add the item to the bill (now works for short barcodes like '1', and for out-of-stock items when 'Allow selling out-of-stock' is on). Sales grid tiles show the VAT-inclusive shelf price (badge reads '5%'); bill lines still show the net price with VAT totalled separately. Double-tap a bill line to edit price/VAT (optionally save to the item). New Settings > Sales tab: allow selling out-of-stock items and set a default VAT %. Item Master profit now calculated after VAT.
